strategy: This is a riddle fight. Answer each round with the given card to load damage traps onto the Sphinx.
Round 1, cast Time. Round 2, cast The Sun. Round 3, cast Memory. Each correct answer stacks a +100% Damage Trap on Krokosphinx.
You are handed a fresh deck and 20,000 health each riddle, so survival is not the concern; answering right is.
After the three traps are up, hit with Myth, Life, or Death (each +30%); avoid Balance (70% resist).
Stack your own blades alongside the three cheat traps, then land one massive hit into the 100,000 health.
cheatNotes: First riddle, answered at the end of Round 1. The answer is Time.
A correct answer stacks a +100% Damage Trap on the Sphinx, free setup for your hit.
Wrong answers earn nothing; only the correct card loads a trap.
Second riddle, answered at the end of Round 2. The answer is The Sun.
Cast The Sun to answer correctly.
Another correct answer adds a second +100% Damage Trap.
Third riddle, answered at the end of Round 3. The answer is Memory.
The third correct answer adds a third +100% Damage Trap. Now hit.
